question: Which customers have the highest spending on tracks from a single genre and what genre is it?
gold_sql:
WITH CustomerGenreSpending AS (
 SELECT
 c.customer_id,
 c.first_name,
 c.last_name,
 g.genre_id,
 g.name AS genre_name,
 SUM(il.unit_price * il.quantity) AS total_spending
 FROM customer c
 JOIN invoice i ON c.customer_id = i.customer_id
 JOIN invoice_line il ON i.invoice_id = il.invoice_id
 JOIN track t ON il.track_id = t.track_id
 JOIN genre g ON t.genre_id = g.genre_id
 GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, g.genre_id, g.name
),
MaxSpendingPerCustomer AS (
 SELECT
 customer_id,
 MAX(total_spending) AS max_spending
 FROM CustomerGenreSpending
 GROUP BY customer_id
)
SELECT
 cgs.customer_id,
 cgs.first_name,
 cgs.last_name,
 cgs.genre_name,
 cgs.total_spending
FROM CustomerGenreSpending cgs
JOIN MaxSpendingPerCustomer mspc ON cgs.customer_id = mspc.customer_id AND cgs.total_spending = mspc.max_spending
ORDER BY cgs.total_spending DESC;

question: Which artists have the longest average track duration across all their albums?
gold_sql:
SELECT ar.artist_id, ar.name, AVG(t.milliseconds) AS avg_track_duration
FROM artist ar
JOIN album al ON ar.artist_id = al.artist_id
JOIN track t ON al.album_id = t.album_id
GROUP BY ar.artist_id, ar.name
ORDER BY avg_track_duration DESC
LIMIT 1;

question: How many tracks fall into each media type category, and what is the average duration for those tracks?
gold_sql:
SELECT mt.name AS media_type, COUNT(t.track_id) AS track_count, AVG(t.milliseconds) AS avg_duration_milliseconds
FROM track t
JOIN media_type mt ON t.media_type_id = mt.media_type_id
GROUP BY mt.name
ORDER BY mt.name;

question: What is the distribution of tracks by genre for each artist?
gold_sql:
SELECT a.name AS artist_name, g.name AS genre_name, COUNT(t.track_id) AS track_count,
       COUNT(t.track_id) * 1.0 / SUM(COUNT(t.track_id)) OVER (PARTITION BY a.artist_id) AS track_percentage
FROM artist a
JOIN album al ON a.artist_id = al.artist_id
JOIN track t ON al.album_id = t.album_id
JOIN genre g ON t.genre_id = g.genre_id
GROUP BY a.artist_id, a.name, g.genre_id, g.name
ORDER BY a.name, g.name;
